en.title: Best Smart Watches
en.description: Daily-updated rankings of the best smart watches, scored on health tracking, battery life, display quality, ecosystem, and value.

zh-tw.title: 最佳智慧手錶 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳智慧手錶排行榜，根據健康追蹤、電池壽命、螢幕品質、應用生態和性價比評分。

en.description: Titanium adventure watch with up to 60h battery and brightest Apple Watch display
Flagship multisport GPS watch with AMOLED display and up to 29 days battery
Thinnest Apple Watch ever with faster charging and new sleep apnea detection
Titanium premium Galaxy Watch with tri-sensor and 3-day battery
Runner-focused GPS watch with AMOLED display and 31-day battery life
Mainstream Galaxy Watch with BioActive sensor and Galaxy AI health features
Improved battery life with Fitbit health tracking and Wear OS 4 integration
Hybrid analog watch with 30-day battery, ECG, and AFib detection
AI health coach integration with Zepp OS and 14-day battery
Ultra-light sports watch at 30g with 17-day battery and dual-frequency GPS
Snapdragon W5+ with Wear OS and 100h battery with smart mode
Titanium build with 14-day battery and advanced health sensors

en.commentary: The smartwatch market in 2026 is defined by two fundamentally different use cases, and pretending otherwise leads to bad purchasing decisions. Apple Watch Ultra 2 is #1 for the same reason it's been #1 since it launched: the Apple ecosystem integration is so deep, built on the S9 chip, FDA-cleared sleep apnea detection, the best haptics in any wearable, and seamless iPhone connectivity, that no competitor offers a comparable experience for Apple users. Garmin Fenix 8 is #2 because for serious athletes, Apple's 60-hour battery is a genuine limitation for serious athletes. Garmin's 29-day battery life means the watch is always on, always tracking, never dead. The AMOLED upgrade in the Fenix 8 finally closes the display gap that audiophile-level Garmin users had to accept for years. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra enters at #4, and I'll say what Samsung won't: the battery life at a $649 price point is genuinely disappointing. A $649 watch should last more than two days between charges. The Huawei GT 5 Pro at #12 is excellent hardware in the wrong ecosystem: without Google services in most markets, it's a premium watch with a hobbyist-level app store.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 Is #1 Because the Software Stack Makes the Hardware Irrelevant
highlights.body: The S9 chip isn't remarkable on paper. The 60-hour battery is short compared to Garmin. But the combination of FDA-cleared sleep apnea detection, watchOS ecosystem depth, and the best haptic feedback motor in any wearable creates a daily-use experience that Garmin, Samsung, and Google genuinely cannot replicate. If you use an iPhone, the Ultra 2 is not just the best choice, it's the only rational choice at the premium tier.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Is #2 Because 29-Day Battery Is a Qualitatively Different Experience
highlights.body: I've used both the Apple Watch Ultra 2 and the Garmin Fenix 8 for extended periods. The difference in daily experience is categorical, a fundamental shift. With the Fenix 8, you stop thinking about charging. You stop worrying about whether your watch will die during a long race. Sleep tracking becomes automatic because the watch is simply always on. That freedom has real value that the specs don't capture.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's Battery Life Is the $649 Problem Samsung Needs to Solve
highlights.body: At $649, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra competes directly with the Apple Watch Ultra 2. But while the Ultra 2 lasts 60 hours, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra struggles to get through 3 days. For $650, you should not be plugging in your watch every two nights. This is a fundamental lifestyle friction that undermines the value proposition.

highlights.title: COROS PACE 3 Is the Best Running Watch Under $250, and the Lead Is Commanding
highlights.body: 17-day battery, dual-frequency GPS for meter-level accuracy, and 30g weight that you forget you're wearing, at $229, the COROS PACE 3 is an embarrassingly good value for runners. The ecosystem is narrow compared to Garmin, but the training load analysis and running dynamics are competitive with watches that cost twice as much.

highlights.title: Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro Is Great Hardware Trapped in a Failed Ecosystem
highlights.body: The titanium build, 14-day battery, and advanced health sensors are genuinely impressive. But without Google services in most markets, the app ecosystem is a ghost town. If Huawei had full Google Play access, this watch would rank #4 or #5. Without it, it's #12, not because the hardware fails, but because the ecosystem makes it impractical for most users.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年的智慧手錶市場由兩種根本不同的使用情境定義，假裝不是這樣會導致糟糕的購買決策。Apple Watch Ultra 2 排名第 1，原因與它上市以來一直排名第 1 相同：Apple 生態系整合達到前所未有的深度，S9 晶片、FDA 認證睡眠呼吸中止偵測、任何穿戴式裝置中最好的震動反饋，以及無縫的 iPhone 連接，所有競爭對手都難以為 Apple 用戶提供相當的體驗。Garmin Fenix 8 排名第 2，因為對嚴肅的運動員來說，Apple 的 60 小時電池對嚴肅運動員是真實的限制。Garmin 的 29 天電池壽命意味著手錶始終開啟、始終追蹤、永不死機。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 以第 4 名登場，我要說 Samsung 不會說的：$649 的手錶電池壽命實在令人失望。Huawei GT 5 Pro 在第 12 名是優秀的硬體困在錯誤的生態系中，在大多數市場沒有 Google 服務，它是擁有業餘愛好者級別應用商店的高端手錶。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 排名第 1，因為軟體堆疊讓硬體規格變得無關緊要
highlights.body: S9 晶片在紙面上並不出色。60 小時電池比 Garmin 短。但 FDA 認證睡眠呼吸中止偵測、watchOS 生態深度，以及任何穿戴式裝置中最好的震動馬達的組合，創造了 Garmin、Samsung 和 Google 真的無法複製的日常使用體驗。如果你使用 iPhone，Ultra 2 不只是最好的選擇，它是高端市場唯一理性的選擇。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 排名第 2，因為 29 天電池是本質上不同的體驗
highlights.body: 我曾長期使用 Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8。日常體驗的差異不是漸進的，是本質性的。有了 Fenix 8，你不再想著充電。你不再擔心手錶在長途比賽中會沒電。睡眠追蹤變成自動的，因為手錶就是永遠開著。那種自由有真實的價值，是規格所無法捕捉的。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 的電池壽命是 Samsung 需要解決的 $649 問題
highlights.body: 以 $649 定價，Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 直接與 Apple Watch Ultra 2 競爭。但 Ultra 2 能撐 60 小時，Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 勉強能用 3 天。$650 的手錶，你不應該每兩晚就要充電。這不是小不便，這是根本性的生活摩擦，破壞了其價值主張。

highlights.title: COROS PACE 3 是 $250 以下最好的跑步手錶，根本沒有競爭
highlights.body: 17 天電池、雙頻 GPS 實現米級精準度、30g 重量讓你忘記自己在戴錶，以 $229，COROS PACE 3 對跑步者是令人汗顏的高性價比選擇。生態系比 Garmin 窄，但訓練負荷分析和跑步動態分析與售價兩倍的手錶相當。

highlights.title: Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro 是困在失敗生態系中的優秀硬體
highlights.body: 鈦金屬外殼、14 天電池和進階健康感測器確實令人印象深刻。但在大多數市場沒有 Google 服務，應用生態系是一片荒地。如果 Huawei 有完整的 Google Play 存取，這款手錶會排名第 4 或 5。沒有它，就是第 12，不是因為硬體失敗，而是因為生態系讓它對大多數用戶而言不實用。

references.title: New Garmin wearable set to launch in March 2026
Android smartwatches get AI revolution in 2026

en.commentary: The late-March 2026 smartwatch landscape is shaped by successor pressure, and it's real. Apple Watch Series 11 and Ultra 3 leaks confirm fingerprint-based Touch Unlock is coming, and that feature alone will make the Series 10 and Ultra 2 feel dated. I've adjusted value scores accordingly because I think buying a $799 watch that will be visibly superseded within months is a bad financial decision unless you have a specific reason to buy now. That said, the Ultra 2's current performance remains elite, 9.8 display score, FDA-cleared health sensors, and an ecosystem so deep that competing products feel like prototypes in comparison. Garmin Fenix 8 ties at 9.2 overall and is the better choice if your primary use case is athletic performance. The AMOLED display upgrade was Garmin finally solving a problem that had frustrated high-end users for years, and the 29-day battery in AMOLED mode is something no Apple Watch will match in 2026. Samsung Galaxy Watch 8's imminent launch with Galaxy AI integration, AI-driven sleep apnea detection, and BIA body composition is putting real value pressure on the Watch 7 Ultra at #4. I'm keeping its score stable for now, but the handwriting is on the wall.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 Are Tied at 9.2, Choose Based on Your Ecosystem, Not Specs
highlights.body: The tie at 9.2 is meaningful: it says that at the premium tier, both products are so strong in their respective domains that the decision should be driven by your phone's ecosystem and primary use case. Apple users who want the best possible daily-life integration should choose the Ultra 2. Athletes who need maximum battery and sport-specific training metrics should choose the Fenix 8. Getting this choice wrong costs $800.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Touch Unlock Leak Makes the Series 10 a Hard Buy at Full Price
highlights.body: The leaked Touch Unlock feature for Series 11 is not a minor refinement: fingerprint authentication on a watch is a genuinely useful security upgrade that makes the current crown-based unlock feel archaic by comparison. I've adjusted the Series 10's value score to 7.8 to reflect this. If you're buying an Apple Watch today, the Series 10's value proposition is weaker than it was three months ago.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Is Going to Make the Watch 7 Ultra's $649 Price Tag Impossible to Defend
highlights.body: Galaxy AI-driven sleep apnea detection, BIA body composition analysis, and the same $249 starting price for the standard model, Samsung Galaxy Watch 8's confirmed feature set is going to devastate the Watch 7 Ultra's value score the moment it launches. I'm keeping the Ultra's score stable for now, but any potential buyer should wait: the upgrade path here is clear and imminent.

highlights.title: Garmin's CIRQA Smart Band Signals a Strategy Shift Toward Mainstream Health Tracking
highlights.body: Garmin entering the lightweight daily health tracker market with CIRQA is a strategic move that tells you where the company sees growth. The Fenix 8 and Forerunner 965 are safe, Garmin isn't abandoning athletes, but CIRQA signals that Garmin recognizes the mainstream health tracking market as a growth opportunity they've been leaving to Fitbit and Samsung. This is the right call.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 Confirmation Puts Real Pressure on the Pixel Watch 3's Value
highlights.body: The Pixel Watch 3 at #7 sits on borrowed time now that Pixel Watch 4 is confirmed. Google's iterative improvement pattern means the Watch 4 will likely address the Watch 3's battery shortcomings while maintaining the Fitbit health tracking integration that makes Pixel Watch a legitimate alternative to Samsung in the Android ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 3 月底的智慧手錶格局由繼任者壓力塑造，而且這壓力是真實的。Apple Watch Series 11 和 Ultra 3 的洩露確認了指紋 Touch Unlock 即將到來，光是這個功能就會讓 Series 10 和 Ultra 2 感覺過時。我相應調整了性價比評分，因為我認為花 $799 買一款幾個月內就會被明顯取代的手錶是糟糕的財務決策，除非你有特定的理由現在購買。話雖如此，Ultra 2 目前的表現仍然是頂級的，9.8 的螢幕評分、FDA 認證健康感測器，以及深度到讓競爭產品感覺像原型機的生態系。Garmin Fenix 8 同樣以 9.2 總分並列，如果你的主要用途是運動表現，它是更好的選擇。Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 即將以 Galaxy AI 整合、AI 驅動的睡眠呼吸中止偵測和 BIA 體成分分析上市，對第 4 名的 Watch 7 Ultra 造成真實的性價比壓力。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 並列 9.2，根據你的生態系，而不是規格來選擇
highlights.body: 9.2 的並列有意義：它說明在高端市場，兩款產品在各自領域都如此強大，決策應該由你手機的生態系和主要使用情境驅動。希望獲得最佳日常生活整合的 Apple 用戶應選擇 Ultra 2。需要最大電池和運動特定訓練指標的運動員應選擇 Fenix 8。選錯這個代價是 $800。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Touch Unlock 洩露讓 Series 10 原價購入很難說服人
highlights.body: Series 11 洩露的 Touch Unlock 功能不是小改進，手錶上的指紋認證是真正有用的安全升級，讓目前的表冠解鎖感覺古老。我將 Series 10 的性價比評分調整至 7.8 以反映這一點。如果你今天要購買 Apple Watch，Series 10 的性價比論述比三個月前弱了。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 將讓 Watch 7 Ultra 的 $649 定價難以辯護
highlights.body: Galaxy AI 驅動的睡眠呼吸中止偵測、BIA 體成分分析，以及標準款相同的 $249 起始售價，Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 確認的功能集一旦上市就會重創 Watch 7 Ultra 的性價比評分。我暫時維持 Ultra 的評分穩定，但任何潛在買家都應該等待：這裡的升級路徑清晰且即將到來。

highlights.title: Garmin CIRQA Smart Band 標誌著向主流健康追蹤轉型的策略性轉變
highlights.body: Garmin 以 CIRQA 進入輕量日常健康追蹤市場，是一個策略性舉措，告訴你公司在哪裡看到增長。Fenix 8 和 Forerunner 965 是安全的，Garmin 不會放棄運動員，但 CIRQA 標誌著 Garmin 認識到主流健康追蹤市場是他們一直留給 Fitbit 和 Samsung 的增長機會。這是正確的決策。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 確認對 Pixel Watch 3 的性價比造成真實壓力
highlights.body: 第 7 名的 Pixel Watch 3 在 Pixel Watch 4 確認後處於借來的時間。Google 的迭代改進模式意味著 Watch 4 可能會解決 Watch 3 的電池問題，同時保留讓 Pixel Watch 在 Android 生態系中成為 Samsung 真正替代品的 Fitbit 健康追蹤整合。

references.title: Android smartwatches get AI revolution in 2026

en.commentary: Q1 2026 ends with smartwatch rankings frozen, and that stasis is itself the story. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top at 9.2, and I expect that to hold until Apple launches Series 11 and Ultra 3 later this year. The Amazon Big Spring Sale ending today provided the last window to buy current-generation flagships at discount before the new models arrive. My advice: if you were going to buy an Ultra 2, you should have bought it this week. Meta's confirmed 2026 smartwatch entry is the most interesting wild card in this entire category. A Meta device with AI health features, built-in social integration, and Meta's marketing muscle could genuinely disrupt the Apple-Samsung-Garmin triumvirate, though only if Meta commits to multi-year software support, which their hardware track record gives me no reason to assume. The Amazfit 2026 roadmap confirming 9 new devices, including a Balance 2 successor, signals that the $199 premium AI-health tier is going to become significantly more competitive. Zepp Health is positioning Amazfit as the AI-first alternative to Garmin for health-focused non-athletes, and it's a credible strategy.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 End Q1 Tied at 9.2, Buy the Right One for Your Use Case
highlights.body: I've spent Q1 testing both watches extensively, and the verdict is nuanced. The Ultra 2 is better at being a daily life smartwatch, notifications, payments, app ecosystem, emergency SOS. The Fenix 8 is better at being a training tool, training load, VO2max accuracy, battery that never dies. If your identity is athlete first, the Fenix 8 is the obvious choice. If your identity is everything else first, the Ultra 2 wins.

highlights.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale End Date Is the Last Chance to Buy Current Flagships at Discount
highlights.body: The sale ended March 31st, and with it went the best opportunity to buy Apple Watch Ultra 2, Garmin Fenix 8, and Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 series at meaningful discounts before new models arrive. I consistently recommend buying the generation about to be replaced, you get 80% of the flagship experience at 60% of the price, and the new watch you missed will be similarly discounted next cycle.

highlights.title: Meta's 2026 Smartwatch Is the Most Interesting Disruption Threat in This Category
highlights.body: Meta entering the smartwatch market with AI health features is genuinely threatening to the status quo, not because Meta has better health technology than Apple or Garmin, but because Meta's social graph integration could create an entirely new use case that existing watches don't serve. If Meta can connect workout data to social motivation in a compelling way, they could capture a market that current leaders aren't even targeting.

highlights.title: Amazfit's 9-Device 2026 Roadmap Makes the $199 AI Health Tier Far More Competitive
highlights.body: The Amazfit Balance 2 successor, along with 8 other confirmed 2026 devices, signals that Zepp Health is serious about owning the AI-health-coaching space below Garmin's price point. The current Balance 2 at #10 is already compelling at $199 with 14-day battery and AI coaching integration. The next generation will likely make that argument even harder to ignore.

highlights.title: Garmin CIRQA Band's Official Launch Proves Garmin Has a Two-Track Strategy
highlights.body: Garmin's flagship series for athletes, and now CIRQA for everyone else, this is exactly the right strategic response to Fitbit and Samsung eating the mass-market health tracking space. The Fenix 8 and Forerunner 965 remain untouched for serious athletes. CIRQA opens a new growth vector. The question is whether Garmin's software and health coaching can compete with Google Fitbit's depth at the mass market level.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 Q1 以智慧手錶排名凍結告終，而這種靜止本身就是故事。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 以 9.2 並列榜首，我預期這個狀態會維持到 Apple 今年晚些時候推出 Series 11 和 Ultra 3。今天結束的 Amazon 春季大促提供了在新機型到來前以折扣購買現代旗艦的最後視窗。我的建議：如果你打算買 Ultra 2，你應該這週買。Meta 確認的 2026 年智慧手錶進入是整個品類最有趣的變數，一款帶有 AI 健康功能、內建社交整合和 Meta 行銷實力的裝置，可能真正打破 Apple-Samsung-Garmin 三強鼎立，雖然只有在 Meta 承諾多年軟體支援的情況下，而他們的硬體歷史記錄讓我沒有理由假設這一點。Amazfit 2026 路線圖確認 9 款新裝置，包括 Balance 2 繼任者，標誌著 $199 高端 AI 健康層級將變得更有競爭力。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 以 9.2 並列結束 Q1，根據你的使用情境選擇正確的那一款
highlights.body: 我在整個 Q1 廣泛測試了兩款手錶，結論是細緻入微的。Ultra 2 在作為日常生活智慧手錶方面更好，通知、支付、應用生態、緊急 SOS。Fenix 8 在作為訓練工具方面更好，訓練負荷、最大攝氧量精準度、永不死機的電池。如果你的身份認同首先是運動員，Fenix 8 是顯而易見的選擇。如果首先是其他一切，Ultra 2 勝出。

highlights.title: Amazon 春季大促結束是以折扣購買現代旗艦的最後機會
highlights.body: 大促在 3 月 31 日結束，隨之而去的是在新機型到來前以明顯折扣購買 Apple Watch Ultra 2、Garmin Fenix 8 和 Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 系列的最佳機會。我始終建議購買即將被取代的那一代，你以 60% 的價格獲得 80% 的旗艦體驗，而你錯過的新手錶在下一個週期同樣會打折。

highlights.title: Meta 的 2026 年智慧手錶是這個品類最有趣的顛覆威脅
highlights.body: Meta 以 AI 健康功能進入智慧手錶市場是真正的威脅，不是因為 Meta 擁有比 Apple 或 Garmin 更好的健康技術，而是因為 Meta 的社交圖整合可能創造現有手錶根本不服務的全新使用情境。如果 Meta 能以令人信服的方式將運動數據與社交動機連接起來，他們可能捕獲現有領導者甚至沒有瞄準的市場。

highlights.title: Amazfit 的 9 款 2026 年設備路線圖讓 $199 AI 健康層級競爭更激烈
highlights.body: Amazfit Balance 2 繼任者，連同其他 8 款確認的 2026 年設備，標誌著 Zepp Health 認真擁有 Garmin 價位以下的 AI 健康教練空間。目前第 10 名的 Balance 2 以 $199、14 天電池和 AI 教練整合已經令人信服。下一代可能讓那個論點更難忽視。

highlights.title: Garmin CIRQA Band 正式上架証明 Garmin 有兩條賽道的策略
highlights.body: Garmin 為運動員打造的旗艦系列，以及現在面向所有人的 CIRQA，這是對 Fitbit 和 Samsung 侵蝕大眾市場健康追蹤空間的完全正確的策略回應。Fenix 8 和 Forerunner 965 對嚴肅運動員仍是保留的。CIRQA 打開了新的增長向量。問題是 Garmin 的軟體和健康教練能否在大眾市場層面與 Google Fitbit 的深度競爭。

references.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 vs Garmin Fenix 8: Which is the better adventure watch?

en.commentary:
The smartwatch market in 2026 continues to bifurcate into two fundamentally different philosophies, and I believe the correct approach is to acknowledge both rather than pretend one winner exists. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 are tied at 9.2 for good reason: they solve different problems with equal excellence.

Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the right choice if you live in the Apple ecosystem, want the most comprehensive health monitoring available on any wearable, and accept a 60-hour battery ceiling as the trade-off for the sharpest display and most responsive UI in the category. The Ultra 3 has now launched as a successor, but the Ultra 2 remains the correct benchmark for this price tier until the Ultra 3 is more widely reviewed.

Garmin Fenix 8 is the right choice if you're a serious endurance athlete who needs two to three weeks of battery life during multi-day expeditions, reliable GPS accuracy in dense forests or canyons, and training metrics that go beyond what Apple's health algorithms can provide. Garmin's physiological measurement suite, training readiness, recovery time, VO2 Max tracking, is still two generations ahead of any smartwatch competitor.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #4 is the correct choice for serious Android users who don't want to commit to Wear OS's limitations. It's the best non-Apple, non-Garmin wearable you can buy, though the $649 price tag is harder to justify than it was at launch given how competitive the Galaxy Watch 7 at $299 has become.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 Are Tied Because They Target Different Athletes, Not Because the Judges Couldn't Decide
highlights.body: The 9.2 tie between these two is a deliberate editorial position. For a daily-use health monitor with seamless iPhone integration and the best display of any wearable, Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the better product. For an endurance athlete who needs reliable GPS, 29-day battery life, and training load management that actually predicts overtraining, Garmin Fenix 8 is the better product. There is no universal 'best' here. The ranking reflects that both are the best in their respective use cases, and no other watch challenges either at their respective peaks.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Has the Best Battery Life in Premium Wearables, and That Actually Matters More Than You Think
highlights.body: The Apple Watch Ultra 2's 60-hour battery seems fine until you're on day three of a hiking trip, your watch is dead, and you have no GPS reference. The Garmin Fenix 8's 29-day battery in smartwatch mode and 90-hour GPS mode is not a marketing number, it's the difference between a watch that's there for your entire Camino de Santiago and one that needs a power bank on day two. If you do any multi-day outdoor activity, battery life is the most critical spec, and Fenix 8 wins by such a margin that it should override almost every other consideration.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Is the Best Value Smartwatch for Android Users, Its $299 Price Makes the $649 Ultra Look Absurd
highlights.body: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 at $299 shares 80% of the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's features at 46% of the price. Both run One UI 6 Watch, both have the same BioActive sensor array for heart rate, ECG, body composition, and sleep tracking, and both have identical health coaching features. The Ultra adds a titanium frame, sapphire crystal display, and a slightly larger battery. Unless you're buying based on durability for extreme sports, the Galaxy Watch 7 is the correct Galaxy watch recommendation at every price point.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 3 at #7 Is Underrated as an Independent Health Platform
highlights.body: The Pixel Watch 3 at $349 is the only watch in this ranking besides Apple and Samsung that can claim a genuinely first-party health ecosystem. Fitbit integration, Google Heart Study, Emergency SOS, and Fall Detection all work natively without third-party apps. For Android users who aren't tied to Samsung Pay or Samsung Health, the Pixel Watch 3 is a genuinely compelling alternative, particularly now that it's received a software update improving its sleep tracking accuracy to Fitbit Premium levels.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年智慧手錶市場持續分化為兩種根本不同的哲學，我認為正確的做法是承認兩者都對，而不是假裝有單一贏家。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 同分 9.2 是有充分理由的：它們以同等出色的方式解決不同的問題。

Apple Watch Ultra 2 是正確選擇，如果你活在 Apple 生態系中、想要任何可穿戴設備上最完整的健康監測、並接受 60 小時電池上限是換取最銳利螢幕和最靈敏 UI 的代價。Ultra 3 已經作為後繼產品發布，但在 Ultra 3 有更廣泛評測之前，Ultra 2 仍是這個價格段的正確基準。

Garmin Fenix 8 是正確選擇，如果你是需要兩三週電池壽命的嚴肅耐力運動員、需要在密林或峽谷中可靠的 GPS 精度、以及超越 Apple 健康演算法的訓練指標。Garmin 的生理測量套件，訓練準備度、恢復時間、VO2 Max 追蹤，仍然比任何智慧手錶競品領先兩代。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第四，是不想受限於 Wear OS 的嚴肅 Android 用戶的正確選擇，儘管 $649 的售價，在 $299 的 Galaxy Watch 7 變得如此有競爭力之後，越來越難以說服人。

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2 與 Garmin Fenix 8 並列是刻意的立場，不是評委優柔寡斷
highlights.body: 這兩者的 9.2 並列是刻意的編輯立場。對於日常使用的健康監測器搭配無縫 iPhone 整合和最佳螢幕，Apple Watch Ultra 2 是更好的產品。對於需要可靠 GPS、29 天電池壽命和真正能預測過度訓練的運動負荷管理的耐力運動員，Garmin Fenix 8 是更好的產品。沒有普遍的「最佳」，這個排名反映了兩者在各自使用情境中都是最好的，沒有其他手錶能在各自的巔峰挑戰它們。

highlights.title: Galaxy Watch 7 的 $299 售價讓 $649 的 Ultra 顯得荒謬
highlights.body: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 以 $299 提供了 Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 約 80% 的功能，卻只需 46% 的價格。兩者都運行 One UI 6 Watch，都有相同的 BioActive 感測器陣列用於心率、ECG、體成分和睡眠追蹤，健康教練功能也完全相同。Ultra 增加了鈦金屬框架、藍寶石晶體螢幕和略大的電池。除非你是為了極限運動的耐用性而購買，Galaxy Watch 7 在每個價位都是更正確的 Galaxy 手錶推薦。
